domain: Yanomami shabono (Amazon Venezuela/Brazil; circular communal dwelling 80-90m central plaza + 10m perimeter; family-built sector units with own hearth; shared central plaza for rituals)
specific_mechanism: Context window partitioned into K angular sectors each with specialised expert FFN; sectors process locally with own KV; share a central plaza residual stream re-read by all sectors at next layer.
llm_application: SHABONO-RING: an angular-sector MoE attention design. The context window is partitioned into K equal angular sectors (sector_k owns indices [k*N/K, (k+1)*N/K)). Each sector has its own specialised expert: dedicated attention head + per-expert FFN. After local sector processing, all sectors WRITE summary tokens to a shared central 'plaza' residual stream of size M << N. Next layer's sectors READ from the plaza residual + their own sector. Differs from Ring Attention (communication topology only), MoE token-routing (per-token not per-sector), UMoE shared-FFN-attention by combining (a) angular CONTEXT-sector partitioning, (b) per-sector specialised expert FFN, (c) shared central-plaza residual stream.
novelty_claim: Ring Attention (Liu 2310.01889), MoE expert routing, UMoE shared-experts already exist. SHABONO-RING recombines angular-context-sector + central-plaza residual. Recombination of existing components.
content_words: perimeter local KV with shared center

llm_side: perimeter local KV with shared center
